custom_css: Header .title-3d{font-family:'Courier New',monospace!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#00ff41!important;text-shadow:0 0 5px #00ff41,0 0 10px #003b11!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important;animation:glitch 2s infinite!important}header .title-3d::before{content:none!important}header button{background:#000!important;border:1px solid #00ff41!important;border-radius:0!important;color:#00ff41!important;font-family:monospace!important}aside .btn-pulse,#main-fire-btn{background:#000!important;color:#00ff41!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border:1px solid #00ff41!important;border-radius:0!important;box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(0,255,65,0.3)!important;animation:data-stream 1.5s infinite linear!important;position:relative;overflow:hidden}#main-fire-btn:active,aside .btn-pulse:active{filter:invert(1)!important;transform:scale(0.98)!important}@keyframes glitch{0%{text-shadow:2px 0 0 #ff00c1,-2px 0 0 #00fff9}25%{text-shadow:-2px 0 0 #ff00c1,2px 0 0 #00fff9}50%{text-shadow:2px 0 0 #ff00c1,-2px 0 0 #00fff9}75%{text-shadow:-2px 0 0 #ff00c1,2px 0 0 #00fff9}100%{text-shadow:2px 0 0 #ff00c1,-2px 0 0 #00fff9}}@keyframes data-stream{0%{box-shadow:0 0 5px #00ff41}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px #00ff41}100%{box-shadow:0 0 5px #00ff41}}#streak-input{background:#0d0d0d!important;border:1px solid #003b11!important;border-left:3px solid #00ff41!important;color:#00ff41!important;font-family:monospace!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#00ff41!important;text-shadow:0 0 8px #00ff41!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:#00ff41!important;height:2px!important}.item-card.selected-card{border:1px solid #00ff41!important;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,255,65,0.2)!important;background:#000!important}
